connections.title: Warehouses
connections.subtitle: Each warehouse is calculated separately and never mixed · {current}/{limit} warehouses
connections.pausedBodyPre: Sync was disabled automatically after 3 consecutive failures. Check the API keys in the warehouse details and click
connections.emptyDesc: Connect Ozon FBO/FBS, Wildberries or Google Sheet — each source becomes a separate warehouse with its own analytics.
connections.priceHint.title: Prices not loading
connections.priceHint.body: {unpriced} of {stocked} in-stock items have no price. Your WB token likely lacks the “Prices & Discounts” scope — without it prices, frozen value and lost revenue can’t be calculated. Add the scope to the token and re-sync the warehouse.
connections.snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click «Sync» to run the first one.
connections.sync.cooldownWb: Wildberries refreshes data about once a minute — wait for the countdown to finish
connections.sync.cooldownGeneric: Protection against too-frequent requests — wait for the countdown to finish
connections.delete.label: Delete
connections.delete.title: Delete source
connections.resume.title: Lift auto-pause and allow the next sync attempt
connections.rename.title: Rename warehouse
connections.errHint.autoRetry: A refresh request is already queued — it will retry automatically within a few minutes, no action needed.
connections.new.title: New warehouse
connections.new.subtitle: Choose a data source. Each warehouse is analyzed separately — the data never overlaps.
connections.new.cardText.googleSheet: Analyze your warehouse from a Google Sheet with stock and prices.
connections.new.cardText.shopify: Analyze a Shopify store's stock and prices via the Admin API (products and their variants).
connections.new.namePlaceholder: Your warehouse name, e.g. "Store warehouse (via FBS)"
connections.new.sheet.rangeHint: Columns: SKU, name, price, stock, snapshot_time (optional).
connections.new.shopify.tokenHint: Token from the store's custom app, starts with shpat_. read_products scope is enough.
connections.new.err.nameRequired.title: Warehouse name is required
connections.new.err.nameRequired.message: Enter a name so you can find the warehouse in the list later.
connections.new.err.sessionExpired.title: Session expired
connections.new.err.limit.title: Warehouse limit reached
connections.new.err.limit.message: Your plan allows {limit} warehouses. Upgrade your plan in the «Plans & billing» section.
connections.new.cardText.csv: Upload stock and prices from a CSV file — any accounting system or Excel. No API, no integrations.
connections.new.cardText.manual: Enter stock manually right in the dashboard: sales and restocks. No exports, no integrations.
